actionUnits.condition: XR select enter path: Requires Fireplace_Traditional to have TeleportAnchorWithFade (derived from TeleportationAnchor) attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnSelectEntered. Also requires a Collider (or EventTrigger) to be present for XR selection and a FadeCanvas in scene (found via FindObjectOfType) for fading. Expected behavior: Coroutine FadeSequence runs QuickFadeIn -> waits for fadeCanvas.CurrentRoutine -> invokes base.OnSelectEntered(args) -> QuickFadeOut. Note: The only serialized MonoBehaviour listed for this object is id 631718164 (script guid 474bcb49853aa07438625e644c072ee6, likely URP Additional Light Data) which does not match TeleportAnchorWithFade and exposes no interactable UnityEvents (m_Calls not present). The specific MonoBehaviour instance id for TeleportAnchorWithFade is not provided, so no direct public no-arg method can be called.

XR select exit path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnSelectExited. Collider/EventTrigger required for XR interaction; FadeCanvas must exist. Expected behavior: FadeSequence wraps base.OnSelectExited(args) with QuickFadeIn/Out. No corresponding m_Calls found in scene meta; MonoBehaviour id for TeleportAnchorWithFade not provided.

XR activate path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnActivated. Collider/EventTrigger required; FadeCanvas must exist. Expected behavior: FadeSequence wraps base.OnActivated(args) with QuickFadeIn/Out. No serialized UnityEvents (m_Calls) present and no MonoBehaviour instance id for TeleportAnchorWithFade provided.

XR deactivate path: Requires TeleportAnchorWithFade attached and TeleportationAnchor.teleportTrigger == OnDeactivated. Collider/EventTrigger required; FadeCanvas must exist. Expected behavior: FadeSequence wraps base.OnDeactivated(args) with QuickFadeIn/Out. Scene meta only shows MonoBehaviour id 631718164 (URP Additional Light Data) which does not map to the provided script; no m_Calls found.
